query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) < 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as very_short,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) BETWEEN 20 AND 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as short,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) BETWEEN 51 AND 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) BETWEEN 151 AND 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as good,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) > 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as long_desc
FROM grants WHERE isActive=1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) BETWEEN 20 AND 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as short,

  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) BETWEEN 151 AND 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as good,
